Kenya • Safari camp dining

Governors' Camp Dining

The Mara is not a city restaurant destination; dining is usually tied to camp quality, guide timing, and whether bush meals are included.

★ 4.6 311 reviews
Image slot Restaurant Governors Camp Dining

About this restaurant

The Mara is not a city restaurant destination; dining is usually tied to camp quality, guide timing, and whether bush meals are included.

Signature dish

Camp breakfasts, bush meals, and classic safari dinners

Practical information

Check whether drinks, bush meals, and private dining are included in the camp rate.

Nearby attraction

This restaurant is recommended for travelers visiting Maasai Mara.

External booking

$$$

Mara River area, Maasai Mara

Nearby stays

Accommodations that pair well

Image slot Stay Governors Camp

Safari tented camp

Governors' Camp

A historic tented camp in a strong game-viewing zone, often used by travelers who want classic Mara atmosphere without losing comfort.

★ 4.7 (684) From $620 / person
Mara River area, Maasai Mara National Reserve
View Details
Image slot Stay Ol Tukai Lodge Amboseli

Safari lodge

Ol Tukai Lodge Amboseli

A well-known Amboseli base for elephant viewing and Kilimanjaro-facing safari days.

★ 4.6 (477) From $300 / night
Inside Amboseli National Park
View Details
